---
title: "Exhaustive reference"
description: "Every frozen symbol, capability, diagnostic, command, format, example, specification, and schema."
---

# Look up anything

{{< include generated/reference-stats.mdinc >}}

::: {.reference-grid}
::: {.reference-card}
### [Language](language.qmd)
Reader forms, evaluator forms, values, scope, contracts, types, effects, and hashes.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Symbols](symbols.qmd)
Every symbol in the compact agent profile, with signature, domain, effects, diagnostics, examples, and source anchors.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Capabilities](capabilities.qmd)
Every host ABI operation grouped by family, including policy fields and maturity metadata.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Diagnostics](diagnostics.qmd)
Every stable diagnostic code, phase, severity, likely causes, and safe repair action.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [CLI](cli.qmd)
Commands, flags, exit codes, JSON envelopes, and machine schema entrypoints.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Formats](formats.qmd)
CoreForm, packages, policies, logs, patches, evidence, registries, locks, bundles, and generated manifests.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Examples](examples.qmd)
Every tracked example workflow and its source files.
:::
::: {.reference-card}
### [Source catalog](source-catalog.qmd)
Every canonical document, JSON authority, schema, policy, status report, and planning source.
:::
:::

## Authority rule

Generated pages are indexes, not new specifications. When prose conflicts, follow the canonical source linked on the record and file an issue against the stale presentation.
